specific_concerns: Mapping the Kaṭha-Upaniṣadic claim of the Self's non-doership to a deprecation policy compresses one of the most metaphysically loaded passages in Indian philosophy into engineering practice. A practitioner could read this as flattening the Upaniṣadic Self into the contract surface. The engineering layer mitigates by preserving literal_meaning, traditional_meaning_consensus, and the disagreements field; by naming the analog as 'category mistake' (which is the logical structure both readings share); and by explicitly disclaiming the misuse ('does not authorize sloppy deprecation').
verdict_reason: Trivialization risk is real but managed. The engineering layer never claims the spec IS the Self. It claims the joint-negation logical structure has an analog in the symmetric engineering errors around deprecation. The Upaniṣadic provenance is preserved in source pack (though not in engineering layer — a small note). PASS at severity 2.
